query:
SELECT id, name, status,
  companyProfile IS NOT NULL as has_cp,
  operationProfile IS NOT NULL as has_op,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.cnpj') as cnpj,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.taxRegime') as taxRegime
FROM projects
WHERE companyProfile IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;

  operationProfile IS NOT NULL as has_op,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.cnpj') as cnpj,
  JSON_EXTRACT(companyProfile, '$.taxRegime') as taxRegime
FROM projects
WHERE companyProfile IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
